finding: from_request_parts control flow (admin short-circuit BEFORE load_groups, singular/plural missing-permission message, INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS 403) is byte-identical to the pre-extraction extractor; only Repos/JWT access is threaded through the resolver

ZieeIdentityResolver::authenticate is the former extract_authenticated_user body verbatim (JWT-from-extensions, Repos.user.get_by_id, active check); load_groups is the former Repos.user.get_user_groups map_err verbatim
E8 golden: ui types.ts byte-identical + openapi.json canonically-equal (jq -S); desktop likewise — verified then restored via git checkout

permission UNION check (user_holds) must not weaken authorization: direct-first then per-active-group check_permissions_array, wildcard/hierarchical semantics inherited from ziee-identity — identical grant surface to check_permission_union

is_admin() bypass preserved and applied at the call site only (not folded into user_holds); non-admin path enforces ALL-of AND over required permissions; a missing resolver fails CLOSED (500, no user), never open

inactive user -> 403 USER_INACTIVE and inactive group elided via active_group_permissions None; unknown user -> 401 USER_NOT_FOUND; token validation still delegates to JwtService.validate_access_token — no auth check dropped
IdentityResolver names only axum Parts, ziee_core::AppError, ziee_identity::Principal — never crate::Repos/User/Group/JwtService; framework stays app-agnostic (BG de-globalization complete)

RequirePermissions<R,Perms> generic with pub user:R::User / pub groups:Vec<R::Group>; derive(Clone,OperationIo)+#[aide(input)] compiles for generic R (conditional Clone impl, unused for non-Clone Perms — same as pre-move)
type aliases RequirePermissions<Perms> and RequireAdmin fix R=ZieeIdentityResolver; mod.rs re-exports unchanged; all ~547 call sites + extractors::RequirePermissions path preserved
PermissionError/Details/Detail keep schemars short-name keys after crate move; with_permission registers the 403 identically -> no schema drift on either surface

#[allow(unused_imports)] on the PermissionError* re-export (surface preservation, no app-side ref); #[allow(dead_code)] moved onto ziee's RequireAdmin alias — ziee builds with zero new warnings under -D unused-imports

resolver installed via Extension(Arc::new(ZieeIdentityResolver)) at BOTH boot sites (lib.rs::setup_server embedded/desktop + main.rs standalone); JWT layer untouched; get_resolver finds Arc<ZieeIdentityResolver>
async_trait boxed futures are Send (User/Group:Send+Sync bounds); from_request_parts future is Send; Arc<R> shared read-only; ZieeIdentityResolver is zero-sized Copy — no shared mutable state

serde+schemars added (versions matched to ziee-identity + server catalog so single src-app/Cargo.lock unifies, no duplicate build); serde_json dev-dep for the moved with_permission test; cargo check -p ziee / -p ziee-desktop / sdk --workspace all exit 0

with_permission_tests moved with the fn (uses ziee_identity::PermissionCheck); checker.rs union tests STAY in ziee (concrete User/Group, app-side) — no test lost (A5 shrink-guard: no covering id dropped)
